title: WunderStats
description: A full, vanilla-esque RPG Stat System!
body:
This mod lets you upgrade your character's attributes using experience levels, and buy perks to make you more powerful!

Press 'P' (Default) to open the Player Stats menu. Here you can read about what and how you can upgrade.

That's it! Have fun exploring with the mod, I'd love to hear your feedback and suggestions on how I can improve the mod in the future!

[NOTE: Is LAN multiplayer compatible for sure, all you need to do is both you and your friend(s) all have the same mod installed]
